data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T09:21 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content:
🪝 Hook Status: deacon/
Role: deacon

Nothing on hook - no work slung

Next: Check inbox for work assignments: gt mail inbox

toolUseResult.stdout:
🪝 Hook Status: deacon/
Role: deacon

Nothing on hook - no work slung

Next: Check inbox for work assignments: gt mail inbox

content.thinking:
Hook is empty. The startup instructions say:

1. Hook has work → RUN IT
2. Hook empty → Check mail for attached work
3. Still nothing → Create patrol wisp

Let me check mail first.

content.text: Hook empty. Checking mail for attached work.

content.thinking: No mail either. Create a new patrol wisp and execute it.

content.text: Patrol wisp created. Checking current step.
